channel.title: Halvren Cycle Diary
channel.description: Public log of desk actions on the Halvren coverage universe. Newest first.

item.title: TOU promoted — May 14, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Tourmaline. Q1 cash flow exceeded guide by 18% and the buyback pace doubled.

item.title: AG flagged — May 9, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: First Majestic. Mexico royalty proposal advanced in legislature; thesis sensitivity revisited.

item.title: CNQ reviewed — May 6, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Canadian Natural. FY 2025 print and 26th consecutive raise reread against the succession question.

item.title: AEM promoted — May 2, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Agnico Eagle. Q1 AISC printed inside guide and the producer-of-the-decade case held.

item.title: CCO reviewed — April 22, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Cameco. Westinghouse contribution disclosed at investor day; integration ahead of plan.

item.title: CNQ reviewed — April 18, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Canadian Natural. Public writeup refreshed against the FY 2025 release and the buyback pace.

item.title: ENB reviewed — April 11, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Enbridge. Mainline apportionment normalised; the turnpike read remains intact.

item.title: ARX promoted — April 4, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: ARC Resources. Attachie Phase 1 in service; the condensate strip moved per-share value the right way.

item.title: FTS reviewed — March 28, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Fortis. 53rd consecutive raise telegraphed in the annual; the rate-base compounding still works.

item.title: CVE flagged — March 21, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Cenovus. Foster Creek turnaround scope widened; full-year capex creeping above plan.

item.title: MEG demoted — March 15, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: MEG Energy. Free cash flow trajectory below sustaining capex through cycle on the revised price deck.

item.title: NTR reviewed — March 12, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Nutrien. Potash netbacks back inside the historical band; retail margin still doing the work.

item.title: TRP flagged — March 5, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: TC Energy. South Bow spin-off operating metrics diverging; rereading the remainco maturity ladder.

item.title: CNR reviewed — February 28, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: CN Rail. Operating ratio held inside 58–60% range; the franchise is still earning the multiple.

item.title: OXY flagged — February 25, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Occidental. Buffett stake disclosure unchanged at 28%; Berkshire signalling, not buying.

item.title: SU reviewed — February 20, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Suncor. Refining utilization at 97% and unit cost down for a fourth quarter running.

item.title: TECK flagged — February 18, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Teck Resources. QB2 ramp curve still flattening; revised through-cycle ROIC walks closer to cost of capital.

item.title: PPL promoted — February 14, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Pembina. Cedar LNG sanctioned with the strip locked; long-dated take-or-pay book extended.

item.title: KMI reviewed — February 12, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Kinder Morgan. Permian gas backlog conversion accelerating; coverage 2.3× on the distribution.

item.title: FCX flagged — February 9, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Freeport. Indonesian smelter delay added six months to the export licence overhang.

item.title: WFG reviewed — February 7, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: West Fraser. BC mill curtailment offset by the U.S. South capacity additions; through-cycle FCF intact.

item.title: AEM reviewed — February 4, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Agnico Eagle. Detour Lake throughput at a new high; the producer-of-the-decade case keeps holding.

item.title: CCO promoted — February 1, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Cameco. Term book signings ran double the 2024 pace at a higher floor price.

item.title: ENB reviewed — January 28, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: Enbridge. Dominion utility rate cases closed inside the requested band; the take-or-pay base reads cleanly.

item.title: TRP reviewed — January 22, 2026
item.author: amirali@halvrencapital.com (Amirali Karimi)
item.description: TC Energy. Post-South-Bow remainco capex pulled back to the regulated base; balance sheet looks lighter.
